title: bot: auto_payment_address feature flag parsed but maybe_auto_respond() never called
description: bot/src/config.rs parses --auto-payment-address CLI flag and stores it in ResolvedBotConfig.auto_payment_address. bot/src/payment.rs exports maybe_auto_respond() which is intended to respond to PaymentRequest events when this flag is set. However, main.rs handle_relay_event() never calls maybe_auto_respond(). The flag, the config field, and the function are all dead with respect to runtime behavior — auto payment responses are never sent regardless of the flag value. The only calls to maybe_auto_respond() are in payment.rs unit tests. Impact: documented --auto-payment-address feature silently does nothing.
